message:

tail -5 "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null
ls -lh "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ls -la "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^d" | tail -6
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2, "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}'
` executed with exit code 0.
